summary: Deprecated audit trail for the spatial-audio registry observation. The current app writes HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Audio\DisableSpatialOnLowLatency = 1, but this pass did not capture a primary Microsoft source for the exact registry contract. A Win25H2Clean guest string scan of likely audio binaries did not surface the exact key name either.

setting.name: Spatial Audio on Low-Latency Devices
setting.casual_explanation: This appears to control whether spatial audio is disabled in a low-latency audio path. It is more of a specialist audio tweak than a normal user setting.
setting.why_people_change_it: People would change it when troubleshooting audio latency, compatibility, or specific device behavior in advanced setups.
setting.tradeoffs_overview: Changing spatial-audio behavior on low-latency devices can affect audio features and compatibility, but this research pass did not capture a primary Microsoft source for the exact registry value used by the app.
setting.professional_notes: The app writes DisableSpatialOnLowLatency = 1 under HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Audio and the repo provenance marks the tweak as repo-backed. This pass did not capture a primary Microsoft source that publishes the value as the supported Windows audio control surface. A Win25H2Clean guest string scan of audiodg.exe, AudioEng.dll, AudioSes.dll, mmdevapi.dll, audiosrv.dll, and AudioEndpointBuilder.dll did not find the exact key string.

allowed_values.label: Primary Microsoft mapping not captured
allowed_values.meaning: This research pass did not capture a primary Microsoft source that publishes DisableSpatialOnLowLatency as a supported registry control.

allowed_values.label: Observed app spatial-audio-off profile
allowed_values.meaning: The current app writes 1 here to disable spatial audio on low-latency devices, but the value is tracked only as an observed implementation.

app_current_implementation.notes: The current app writes DisableSpatialOnLowLatency = 1, but this pass did not capture a primary Microsoft source for the exact registry contract.

windows_defaults.label: Conservative baseline
windows_defaults.applies_to: Windows systems where this dataset has not validated the spatial-audio registry contract

states.rationale: Do not publish the spatial-audio registry write as validated until a primary Microsoft source is captured.

windows_defaults.notes: This keeps the audio-engine tweak documented without overstating confidence in the registry path.

recommended_profiles.label: Hold for research

states.rationale: Keep the registry write blocked until a primary Microsoft source is captured.

recommended_profiles.good_when: You want to document the current tweak without publishing it as a validated Windows control.
recommended_profiles.bad_when: You need a fully sourced spatial-audio preset.
tradeoffs: The registry mapping remains blocked from validated publication.

evidence.title: Repo source note for audio.disable-spatial-audio
evidence.summary: The repo source note links DisableSpatialOnLowLatency to upstream nohuto research and marks the tweak as repo-backed.

evidence.title: Guest string scan for spatial-audio registry contract
evidence.summary: Win25H2Clean guest string scan of audiodg.exe, AudioEng.dll, AudioSes.dll, mmdevapi.dll, audiosrv.dll, and AudioEndpointBuilder.dll did not find DisableSpatialOnLowLatency. A Ghidra headless attempt was started but did not produce a usable result in this session.

decision.why: The repo-backed implementation is clear, but this pass did not capture a primary Microsoft source for the exact spatial-audio registry contract. A Win25H2Clean guest string scan of likely audio binaries did not find the exact key string either, and the Ghidra headless attempt was not productive enough to turn this into a validated runtime contract. No additional VM validation path is currently yielding stronger proof for this deprecated audit trail.
blocking_issues: No primary Microsoft source for HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Audio\DisableSpatialOnLowLatency was captured in this pass.

validation_proof.exact_quote_or_path: Repo source note for audio.disable-spatial-audio: The repo source note links DisableSpatialOnLowLatency to upstream nohuto research and marks the tweak as repo-backed.
validation_proof.notes: Backfilled from evidence_id repo-provenance-audio-disable-spatial-audio (repo-doc); deprecated audit trail. Supplemental guest string-scan evidence is captured in evidence_id guest-audio-string-scan.
